{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=In the name of cost efficiency, Peter decided to change the dev team's meal plan: 3 bananas in the morning and 4 bananas in the evening. The dev team members were up in arms. So, Peter cleverly adjusted the plan: 4 bananas in the morning and 3 bananas in the evening. Suddenly, the team members cheered and gave him a standing ovation!
|affct=FAME
|hard=HP
|source=Spring Day event
|color=purple
|earth=8
|water=6
|fire=6
|wind=6
|form=Dragon
|element=Earth
|realm=Rift
|orangehard=ATK
}}
